title: Creepy! [16x]
description: A Halloween themed pack made for 1.8.9
body:
The Creepy! [16x] is a Cyan/Green made for the spooky season.

It is mainly made fpr 1.8.9 bedwars but can be used in whatever gamemode in this version you'd like.

It has a kinda creepy theme but idk not i'm not good at making spooky things :/

Here are some screenshots with the pack :)

![Creepy! prev1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2074e1157511c2fbeb82e349b76e290e1e890e7.jpeg)

![Creepy! prev2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/824da1b65f3ce135af9788b1f367e052d9c06aed.jpeg)

![Creepy! prev3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee13c9d1e7213c665f12ba32d7f983f48ecb2472.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
